file_selection.title: 📂 FILE SELECTION
items: Single XML file — via '📂 Browse' button
Keyed folder — via '📂 Select ▾' → '📁 Select folder'
Drag & Drop XML file onto the window

editing.title: ✍️ EDITING
items: Key — XML tag name (cannot be changed)
Ctrl+Return — save and go to next entry

folder_mode.title: 📁 FOLDER MODE (KEYED)
items: Load all XML files from Keyed folder
Automatic translation status detection for each file
Color coding: ✅ Translated | ⚠️ Partial | ⬜ Not translated

diff.title: 🔀 DIFF (COMPARE WITH ORIGINAL)
items: Shows character-level changes between original and translation
Data: current value (your translation) vs original_value (from XML file)

glossary.title: 📖 GLOSSARY
items: Custom dictionary of terms for translation consistency

history.title: 📜 VERSION HISTORY
items: View previous versions of the file
Stores up to 50 most recent changes

suggestions.title: 💡 TRANSLATION SUGGESTIONS
items: Recommendations from the database of previous translations
Shows confidence level and source for each suggestion
Apply selected suggestions with one click

operations.title: 🔧 OPERATIONS
items: Mass edit — batch processing of entries
Auto-translate — automatic translation of empty entries via engines
Find & Replace — bulk text replacement across entries

quality_check.title: ✅ QUALITY CHECK
items: Translation length — warn about too long/short translations
Caps Lock — detect accidentally enabled Caps Lock

hotkeys.title: ⌨️ HOTKEYS
items: Ctrl+Return — save and go to next entry
